text_block_list.text:
I'm discussing the day's training schedule with
Narita Brian, when...

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
Just as I thought... You're the perfect subject for
my novel!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...And who are you exactly?

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
I'm a novelist. I've received permission to come
perform research for my next novel!
choice_data_list: You want to base it on Brian?

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It's the story of an overwhelmingly powerful
Umamusume who is reborn in a fantasy world...

text_block_list.name: Brian Reborn
text_block_list.text:
You thought you could outrun these legs? I may
have reincarnated, but I'm still an Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Brian Reborn
text_block_list.text:
Now, make my day! Draw your sword—face me
and fight!

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text: See? You're perfect for the part of a hero!

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
So please allow me to interview you for this
surefire masterpiece!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I've got nothing to talk about. You're interrupting
my training.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! ...Trainer! Can I at least observe the training
session?
choice_data_list: I guess you can watch from the side...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Let's go already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Phew... And that's three sets of fifty.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
I see. If you can lift that much, then I suppose I
should use a long sword or an axe for the weapon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That's it for the warm-up. Let's double up the
weight.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
What?! Double?! ...Th-that's... quite
extraordinary...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... And that's five laps.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
So she can run five laps around the track? Just as
I thought! I'll reference it in the—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to take off the ankle weights and do
three more laps.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! You were wearing ankle weights?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text: Amazing... So this is the real Narita Brian...

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if I'd say helpful... More like
shocking. I've created a variety of protagonists
before, but...

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
They all pale in comparison next to what I've seen
today. Her drive surpasses any fiction!

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
I want to write her as she really is! A novel with
the real Brian as the main character!
choice_data_list: What happened to the fantasy novel?

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
I... I can't stop thinking about the spectacle that
unfolded before my very own eyes!

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
Brian! Tell me more about yourself... and that
strength of yours!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch. No thanks. You're interfering with my
running.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
Oh, c'mon... P-please, Trainer! Tell me something
about the source of that unrelenting drive...
choice_data_list: Stick around and see for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
I see! Her stride—the very way she sets down her
feet—has tremendous power about it as well!

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
The picture's coming together now! "Her arms lift
great trees, her legs split the earth..."

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm not dealing with this. I'm going to keep
training.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
Ooohhh! "She runs off, looking like an eagle
hunting its prey!"

The novelist was clearly excited, but I get a
message a few days later notifying me he has
given up the project because he doesn't have the
craft to do Narita Brian justice.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What? No—

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
I see... Okay, I'll stick with it! A masterpiece like
this is only possible through persistent reporting!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch, what a pain. I'm going to run my laps around
the academy grounds, as planned.

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Wait a minute! If you're going to do that, I'll
follow after you in my car, and when you take a
break...

text_block_list.name: Novelist
text_block_list.text:
Wh-when is she going to stop?! Could it be that
this stamina is the source of her drive?!

Narita Brian gives me an earful afterward. Still, all
that running away from the novelist was good
training.
